title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Inorbit Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Inorbit Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
